title: The Wildest Sun A Novel
author: Asha Lemmie
prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is verbatim from the "The Wildest Sun A Novel" book by Asha Lemmie?
Options:
A. I'm of medium height, but gangling like someone much taller, with skinny arms and legs that seem out of sync with my body. I'm flat as a pancake so far. I have olive toned skin, big eyes, a tight mouth, and a small, straight nose that's one of my only okay features. My eyes are an uninteresting brown, and my hair is the same boring shade. I hate my hair the most since it's absurdly fine. Nothing keeps it looking decent for long. Currently it's cropped to fall just below my chin. I try pin curls but it's largely hopeless.
B. I'm of middling height, but gangly like someone much taller, with scrawny arms and legs that seem out of proportion. So far my chest is flat with no curves. My skin is olive toned, with big eyes, a tight mouth, and a small, straight nose that's one of my only decent features. My eyes are a boring brown, just like my hair which I hate the most since it's absurdly fine. No amount of product keeps it looking good for long. Currently I have it cut to fall just under my chin. I try pin curls but it's mostly a lost cause.
C. I am of average height, but as gangly as someone much taller, with skinny arms and legs that don’t seem to fit my frame. So far at least, I am flat as a washboard. I am olive skinned, with large eyes, a pinched mouth, and a small, straight nose that is one of my only favorable features. My eyes are the world’s most uninspiring shade of brown, and my hair matches them exactly. I despise my hair most of all, because it is ludicrously thin. All the product in the world will only help me for a few hours. Right now I have it cropped so that it falls just below my chin. I try to pin curl it, but it’s mostly hopeless. 
D. I'm average in height, but awkwardly lanky as if I were much taller, with spindly limbs that don't match my frame. I'm as flat as a board so far. I have olive skin, large eyes, a pinched mouth, and a petite, straight nose that's one of my only nice features. My eyes are a dull brown, and my hair is exactly the same dreary shade. I despise my hair the most because it's ridiculously thin. No products in the world will make it look good for more than a few hours. Right now I have it cut to fall just below my chin. I try to pin curl it, but it's mostly a lost cause.  
Answer:

I have olive toned skin, big eyes, a tight mouth, and a small, straight nose that's one of my only okay features. My eyes are an uninteresting brown, and my hair is the same boring shade. I hate my hair the most since it's absurdly fine. Nothing keeps it looking decent for long. Currently it's cropped to fall just below my chin. I try pin curls but it's largely hopeless.
options.B: I'm of middling height, but gangly like someone much taller, with scrawny arms and legs that seem out of proportion. So far my chest is flat with no curves. My skin is olive toned, with big eyes, a tight mouth, and a small, straight nose that's one of my only decent features. My eyes are a boring brown, just like my hair which I hate the most since it's absurdly fine. No amount of product keeps it looking good for long. Currently I have it cut to fall just under my chin. I try pin curls but it's mostly a lost cause.
options.C: I am of average height, but as gangly as someone much taller, with skinny arms and legs that don’t seem to fit my frame. So far at least, I am flat as a washboard. I am olive skinned, with large eyes, a pinched mouth, and a small, straight nose that is one of my only favorable features. My eyes are the world’s most uninspiring shade of brown, and my hair matches them exactly. I despise my hair most of all, because it is ludicrously thin. All the product in the world will only help me for a few hours. Right now I have it cropped so that it falls just below my chin. I try to pin curl it, but it’s mostly hopeless.
options.D: I'm average in height, but awkwardly lanky as if I were much taller, with spindly limbs that don't match my frame. I'm as flat as a board so far. I have olive skin, large eyes, a pinched mouth, and a petite, straight nose that's one of my only nice features. My eyes are a dull brown, and my hair is exactly the same dreary shade. I despise my hair the most because it's ridiculously thin. No products in the world will make it look good for more than a few hours. Right now I have it cut to fall just below my chin. I try to pin curl it, but it's mostly a lost cause.
